title: dendranthema pallasianum
intro: Dendranthema pallasianum, also known as Pallas' chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including relieving fever, reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Dendranthema pallasianum is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its extracts may also be used in ointments and salves to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
